TestDescription: API Test for Employer Entity - Validations

notifications.message: The field Name must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '40'.
The field Code must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '16'.
The field State must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '2'.
The field City must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '35'.
The field PostalCode must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '10'.
The field EmailAddress must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '60'.
The field Faxnumber must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '16'.
The field PhoneNumber must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '16'.
The field StreetAddress must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '255'.
The field PhoneExtension must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '5'.
The field Url must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '100'.
The field FeeDescription must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '50'.
